ogTitle: Gordonvale vs Gowrie Junction: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gordonvale and Gowrie Junction.
heading: Gordonvale vs Gowrie Junction — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gordonvale, Queensland and Gowrie Junction, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gordonvale has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Gowrie Junction (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gordonvale or Gowrie Junction safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gordonvale has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Gowrie Junction scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gordonvale scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Gowrie Junction scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gordonvale or Gowrie Junction?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gordonvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
